positive: A whimsical celestial forest scene, featuring a central glowing oak tree with roots intertwined with bioluminescent vines. The foreground includes stylized crescent moons, abstract constellations forming geometric patterns, and gentle, oversized flora that emit a soft, magical light. Style: Modern illustrative tattoo art meets Art Nouveau geometry. Composition: Highly symmetrical and dense, emphasizing a central vertical axis. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro with deep indigo and cosmic violet background hues, contrasting sharply with bright emerald green and gold accents. Color Palette: Deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted by luminous gold and pale cyan. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. High contrast, clean lines, silhouette focus.
